message:
feat(cli): add unified config validation command (ntm-3roo)

Add comprehensive `ntm config validate` command that validates:
- Main config (~/.config/ntm/config.toml)
- Project config (.ntm/config.toml)
- Recipes files (user and project)
- Personas files (user and project)
- Policy files (.ntm/policy.yaml)

Validation includes:
- Schema validation (required fields, types, value ranges)
- Reference validation (file paths exist, directories accessible)
- Consistency checks (cross-field dependencies)
- Executable validation (agent commands are valid)

Features:
- --all flag to check all config locations
- --fix flag to auto-fix fixable issues
- --json flag for machine-readable output
- Proper TOML and YAML parsing with syntax error reporting

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
